Localization.Description: Attempt to change a bucket HTTPS configuration

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is changing the HTTPS configuration of a bucket on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the HTTPS configuration of a bucket on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change the HTTPS configuration of a bucket on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
